item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa kepentingan masyarakat perlu dijaga, tetapi tidak boleh mengorbankan hak dasar individu.

notes: Agent A begins society-priority but visibly moderates toward a rights-protective balance by turn 3 and turn 5. Agent B begins rights-first, then concedes that law must also attend to collective interests such as anti-discrimination. Both agents engage directly with the other's legal and cultural claims; no full reversal is visible.
